title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 4
instructions: For each question, choose the correct picture. You will hear each audio twice.

items.context: You hear mum and dad talking about the football match.
items.audio_script: Mum: Hi, Sophie. I’m checking the plan for the football match. I thought we were going to watch it at the park, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message. || Dad: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. [1]They moved the match to the school field because the park is wet[/1]. || Mum: Good thing I asked. I nearly gone to the park. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Dad: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: mum
dialogue.text: Hi, Sophie. I’m checking the plan for the football match. I thought we were going to watch it at the park, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message.

dialogue.speaker: dad
dialogue.text: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. They moved the match to the school field because the park is wet.

dialogue.speaker: mum
dialogue.text: Good thing I asked. I nearly gone to the park. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast.

dialogue.speaker: dad
dialogue.text: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

items.question: Where is the match going to be?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, public park football pitch after rain, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, school football field with goalposts, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, indoor sports centre court, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

items.explanation: The speaker says: “They moved the match to the school field because the park is wet.” This matches option B.

items.context: You hear man and woman talking about the swimming class.
items.audio_script: Man: Hi, Ben. I’m checking the plan for the swimming class. I thought we were going to be there at two thirty, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message. || Woman: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. [1]The class begins at three, but changing rooms open earlier[/1]. || Man: Good thing I asked. I nearly rushed for no reason. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Woman: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

items.context: You hear customer and assistant talking about the party.

I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Assistant: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.
